_doc: Phase WX-G2 content-driven relevance gate for the AIWizard system prompt. Read by SystemPromptRelevanceStore.swift. The Swift assembler ONLY reads this map; all relevance policy is content here (retunable via git PR, zero rebuild). Conservative rule: when relevance is unknown, INCLUDE. This file is the authoritative SUPERSET of the embedded Swift fallback. ASCII only.
_gameScopedAssetPackIDs_doc: Asset packs that are game-piece libraries (boards, dice, cards, arcade sprites). Dropped from the prompt for NON-game goals so e.g. a multi-timer does not carry a backgammon board. Game goals keep all packs (no over-strip). IDs match AssetPack.packID in the bundled Resources/AssetPacks + mchatai-source/assets/packs.
_sectionGroups_doc: Optional speculative section-groups the assembler can skip. default include|exclude when no genre rule matches; includeForGenres/excludeForGenres override by genre class (game|general). Conservative: omit a group to always include it.

codeEvidenceSearchBrief._doc: External Code / Docs Evidence search brief (#16). Reference implementations from a web/code search; up to ~18KB and an async LLM-backed search. Most useful for novel/complex builds (games, integrations); low value-add for simple productivity tools and documents. Excluded for general goals; the search itself is skipped too (latency + cost win).
